title: The Bygone
description: Have you ever wondered what time forgot? Explore a dimension accessed by archeology and find out for yourself!
body:
***
![bygone logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab7d6ceb4c8fdc66e71d7521db1f7f8c2c6e9f16.png)

### **Journey to a prehistoric dimension through the power of archeology!** Activate a Bygone Frame with a special artifact to explore ancient biomes, battle forgotten mobs, and uncover lost Minecraft secrets. ***

![About section divider](https://i.imgur.com/52LU4mv.png)
**Bygone is a mod that transforms your gameplay experience with a mysterious prehistoric realm. Unleash your inner explorer as you:** - Unlock portals using archaeology and hidden artifacts - Discover lost biomes, ancient creatures, and rare treasures - Survive challenging new threats lurking in a forgotten epoch **Bygone is designed for both **Fabric** and **NeoForge**. Quick to install, intuitive to play, and ideal for anyone excited to uncover ancient legends.** Whether you're a veteran archaeologist, a treasure hunter, or just chasing that next great adventure, Bygone invites you to step into a primeval land packed with secrets. **We have been hard at work on our latest update, Soul Survival! We have just released the latest snapshot on our [Discord](discord.gg/fVAGEvF58j) as well!** --- ## Quick Install ### Fabric - Download: Fabric API, JinxedLib, Lithostitched, Bygone (Fabric version) ### NeoForge - Download: CustomPortalAPI-Reforged, JinxedLib, Lithostitched, Bygone (NeoForge version) Put all `.jar` files in your `mods` folder. --- ## How to Play ### 1. Find a Bygone Frame Underground or via new Cartographer maps. ### 2. Get an Arcane Core Found through archaeology in Trail Ruins or Ominous Vaults. ### 3. Activate the Frame Use the Arcane Core on the Bygone Frame. ### 4. Enter the Bygone Dimension Step through and embark on your adventure. --- ## Support & Links Feedback and community ideas welcome - join our Discord! **Step through. Thrive in a world lost to time!**
